name: workday
description: Workday Canvas Kit palette translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes:
Canvas Kit v9 'main' light theme. Workday's brand blue (a teal-leaning navy) is the accent. Roboto typeface is open-source.

Phase 3.5b fidelity status: Tier C. License incompatibility — Workday Canvas Tokens ships under CC-BY-ND-4.0 (NoDerivatives), which prohibits redistribution of derivative works. Quoin packs are derivatives; we cannot relicense values under MIT/Apache-2.0. Tier C designed-approximation values stand; consumers needing exact Canvas tokens should install @workday/canvas-tokens-web directly under its own license.

mappingNotes: Canvas's licorice (text), soap (light backgrounds), berrySmoothie (brand accent in newer themes — using blueberry here for the classic accent). Status colours follow Canvas's pomegranate/greenApple/cantaloupe/blueberry naming.
